subject: Voltorb, a round red-and-white ball-like creature with an angry expression, surrounded by electrical energy
description: A perfectly round red-and-white sphere with a scowling face floats in a dark background. The figure is bisected horizontally, red on top and white on bottom, with a simple angry expression — downward-slanted brows and a hard line for a mouth. Around it, purple or electric crackling lines radiate outward, suggesting contained explosive energy. The background is dark, making the glowing energy lines highly visible. The design is minimal and iconic — almost entirely abstract and geometric.
foreground: round red-and-white sphere with angry face and radiating electrical energy
background: dark background with electric energy lines
